education.degree: Bachelor of Technology, Electronics and Telecommunications Engineering
education.activities: Part of the ISF IETE RGIT college committee for 3 years; Event Management Secretary for 2022–2023.
courses: Artificial Neural Networks and Fuzzy Logic

experiences.title: AI Engineer
experiences.subtitle: Federal Government Contracting Consultancy
experiences.summary: Build production AI systems for federal-opportunity intelligence: LLM scoring pipelines, automated content generation, and the data infrastructure that feeds them. 150+ merged PRs across 40+ repositories.
experiences.stack: Python · TypeScript / Next.js · SQL (Postgres, BigQuery) · Anthropic Claude API · LLM pipeline design · MCP server development · RAG-style retrieval · GCP (Cloud Run, Cloud SQL, BigQuery, Scheduler, Secret Manager, WIF) · Vercel · HubSpot & Google Workspace APIs

bullets.text: Designed and own an LLM-powered opportunity-scoring engine (Anthropic Claude API) that ranks federal solicitations against client profiles across 19 weighted dimensions; engine output feeds 7 downstream consumers across 4 repos (sales decks, advisor portal, call cards).

Optimized the scoring pipeline with prompt caching and a Haiku/Sonnet model-tiering strategy, cutting inference cost to ~$0.01 per prospect and making AI scoring viable at production scale across ~190 clients.
Built an automated content-generation pipeline that turns structured CRM data into tailored pitch decks and client capability statements, replacing manual assembly for the business-development team.

Engineered the data infrastructure powering the AI layer — a federal-leads pipeline spanning 3 GCP projects (Cloud Run Jobs, Cloud SQL, BigQuery, Cloud Scheduler) that ingests SAM.gov and HigherGov data and exposes clean, scored datasets to the models.
Developed custom MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers and Claude Code plugins/agents to extend internal AI tooling and integrate HubSpot CRM, Google Workspace, and Canva into agentic workflows.

Shipped reliability practices for AI systems in production: schema-verified prompts, graceful LLM-failure handling surfaced into response payloads, streaming for long generations, and dry-run gating before any bulk write.

Spearheaded adaptation of the EXSCLAIM! tool to autonomously extract microscopy images from scientific literature at scale, establishing a protein-polymer image repository that serves as the training data foundation for ML-based materials research.

Orchestrated journal scraping pipeline integration across multiple scientific publishers (Nature, RSC Soft Matter Journal), troubleshooting WebDriver issues and optimizing HTML parsing strategies to expand data collection scope by 2x.

Administered a private GitHub repository and integrated project execution on the Circe HPC system with SSH authentication, ensuring structured image storage, retrieval scalability, and reproducible research workflows.

Conducted a systematic review of 100–150 NLP research papers documenting key methodologies, performance trade-offs, and architectural limitations across Transformer-based, RNN, and encoder-decoder models to inform future model selection decisions.

Analyzed and compared semantic graphs and sequence-to-sequence architectures for summarization and text generation tasks, compiling a structured internal knowledge base that reduced future model selection time for the team.

Developed and optimized supervised learning models (Random Forest, SVM) on real-world datasets using Python, achieving high accuracy through systematic data preprocessing, feature engineering, and cross-validation pipelines.

Integrated Python with SQL databases for end-to-end EDA and model deployment pipelines, simulating production-grade data science workflows including data ingestion, transformation, and evaluation reporting.

projects.title: Stock Prediction Agent
projects.tech: Python · LangChain · LangGraph · MCP · Bright Data API · Agentic AI

bullets.text: Developed an AI-powered multi-agent system using LangChain, LangGraph, and MCP (Bright Data) to generate actionable short-term trading recommendations for NYSE-listed companies, coordinating specialized agents under a supervisor agent architecture.

Orchestrated specialized agents for stock discovery, real-time market data analysis, news sentiment classification, and buy/sell/hold recommendation generation, delivering actionable target entry prices with sentiment-backed interpretability.

projects.title: Document Analysis, Chat & Comparison Portal with Advanced RAG
projects.tech: Python · LangChain · FastAPI · Streamlit · AWS (Fargate, ECR, Secrets Manager) · Docker · GitHub Actions · LLMs · Vector Stores

bullets.text: Engineered and deployed an Advanced RAG Pipeline (Ingestion → Retriever → Generator) for intelligent document analysis, optimizing retrieval accuracy using Query Rewriting (RAG Fusion/ReAct) and MMR Rerankers with LangChain chunking and indexing.

Drove end-to-end technical delivery of a full-stack AI platform: FastAPI backend, Streamlit UI, automated CI/CD via GitHub Actions and Docker, deployed on AWS Fargate and ECR for production-scale scalability.

Optimized throughput using local LLMs (vLLM/Groq) and quantized models, implemented Cache-Augmented Generation (CAG) to accelerate repeated query responses, achieving low-latency production-ready AI services.

projects.title: Abstractive NLP Text Summarizer
projects.tech: Python · NLP · BERT · Pegasus · Simple T5 · XLNet · GPT-2

bullets.text: Built and fine-tuned a chat summarization system using BERT, Pegasus, Simple T5, XLNet, and GPT-2 on the SAMSUM dataset, comparing model performance and deploying the best-performing Pegasus model as a web application.

projects.title: Bone Fracture Detection — CNN
projects.tech: Python · Deep Learning · CNN · TensorFlow · MURAv1.1 Dataset

bullets.text: Developed a CNN model on the MURAv1.1 medical imaging dataset to detect bone fractures from X-ray images, achieving 87.5% accuracy, 92% precision, 94.29% specificity, and 85.18% F1 score on held-out test data.

projects.title: Flight Price Prediction ML Model
projects.tech: Python · Pandas · NumPy · Matplotlib · Seaborn · Scikit-Learn

bullets.text: Preprocessed 10,000+ real-world flight records across 41 features and trained Random Forest, Decision Tree, Linear Regression, and KNN models, achieving 95–97% training accuracy with Random Forest and Decision Tree Regressors.

projects.title: HR Analytics Dashboard
projects.tech: Power BI · Excel · DAX · Data Visualization · KPI Reporting

bullets.text: Designed an executive-ready Power BI dashboard tracking attrition rate, salary trends, employee demographics, and job satisfaction KPIs, delivering visualizations (donut charts, heatmaps, bar graphs) to surface attrition drivers by role, tenure, and education.

achievements.text: Published research paper at JETIR on Text Summarization using Pre-trained NLP models.
